title: Restore missing Spider-Verse comic panel images

requirements.summary: Wire the 13 regenerated Spider-Verse comic panel images into the comic data structure so they render correctly in the viewer
acceptanceCriteria: All 13 panel images are available in frontend/public/assets/generated
Images are referenced correctly in the comic data structure
Comic viewer displays all panels without missing image warnings for these specific panels

file_operations.description: Update the comic data structure to reference the regenerated panel images. Locate panels 7-19 (excluding panel 20) in the data structure and ensure their illustration fields point to the correct workspace paths: frontend/public/assets/generated/spiderverse-panel-07.dim_1024x768.png through frontend/public/assets/generated/spiderverse-panel-19.dim_1024x768.png. Verify that these exact filenames match the generated assets and that no references to panel 20 are included in this change.
